body: This is a followup to #1821. This PR adds deprecations for the methods removed in #1821 so that we can do a patch release instead. This will allow us to incrementally upgrade a bit more smoothly.
title: Deprecate mesh-only methods

body:
This PR:
 - adds a GPU job for the existing CPU stencil benchmarks
 - Removes the `soft_fail`, and instead prints warnings when potential regressions occur (https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/issues/1760)

I've also switched to using the minimum time, as this is the best at noise rejection.
title: Add GPU job for stencil benchmarks
